case_title: JACKY ZHAO KANG LIU VS. VANESSA LIU

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROGRESS REPORT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY KANG LIU, JACKY ZHAO AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, VANESSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROGRESS REPORT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED JUL-26-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, VANESSA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-17-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JACKY ZHAO KANG LIU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VANESSA LIU IS NOT PRESENT. IF NO APPEARANCE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY SIX MONTHS UNTIL THE ENTIRE STIPULATED AMOUNT OF $7000 IS FULLY PAID. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED EXCEPT WHEN DEFENDANT DEFAULTED ON HIS PAYMENTS. FULL PAYMENT IS DEEMED COMPLETED IN SEPTEMBER 2027. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-17-2025 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JACK ZHAO KANG LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VANESSA LIU IS PRESENT. PARTIES ARE ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMANDA PETERS. PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT IN WHICH THE DEFENDANT WILL PAY THE PLAINTIFF $200.00 A MONTH BY THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE STIPULATED $7000.00 DEBPT IS PAID OFF OVER THE NEXT 35 MONTHS. THIS MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY SIX MONTHS. IF PAYMENTS ARE BEING MADE, NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED. IF NO APPEARANCE IS MADE ON THE FINAL DATE IN SEPTEMBER OF 2027, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WHITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: SETTLEMENT AND PROGRESS REPORT DATES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-17-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. IF NO APPEARANCE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY SIX MONTHS UNTIL THE ENTIRE OBLIGATION IS FULLY PAID. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED EXCEPT WHEN DEFENDANT DEFAULTED ON HIS PAYMENTS. FULL PAYMENT IS DEEMED COMPLETED IN SEPTEMBER 2027. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JACKY ZHAO KANG LIU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VANESSA LIU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-17-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JACKY ZHAO KANG LIU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VANESSA LIU IS NOT PRESENT. IF NO APPEARANCE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY SIX MONTHS UNTIL THE ENTIRE STIPULATED AMOUNT OF $7000.00 IS FULLY PAID. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED EXCEPT WHEN DEFENDANT DEFAULTED ON HIS PAYMENT. FULL PAYMENT IS DEEMED COMPLETED IN SEPTEMBER 2027. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE : RE: PROGRESS REPORT
